title: Korak 39

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should have a variable named movies in your __str__ method.
You should have a variable named series in your __str__ method.

description: Nakon izjave if u vašoj metodi __str__, kreirajte dve varijable pod nazivima movies i series i dodelite im, respektivno, poziv metode get_movies i poziv metode get_tv_series.
